summary: Comprehensive E2E testing completed for GreenLink Agritech Platform. Tested all 3 user roles (Admin, Cooperative, Carbon Auditor), login/authentication, dashboards, Carbon Auditor management, Audit Missions, Cooperative Members/Agents management, SSRTE tracking, QR Codes generation, and Account Activation flows. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend flows working correctly (100%).

issues: Minor console error about DataCloneError from emergent-main.js script - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented across all tested pages
Authentication flow correctly redirects users based on user_type (admin -> /admin/dashboard, cooperative -> /cooperative/dashboard, carbon_auditor -> /auditor/dashboard)
Carbon Auditor dashboard shows missions, stats, and certifications correctly
Cooperative dashboard displays all stats (members, parcels, lots, financial data) correctly
SSRTE tracking page with comprehensive child labor monitoring form is working
QR Codes generation for all members is functional with export options
seed_data_creation: No new test data created - used existing seeded data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major functionalities verified working: 1) Admin login -> /admin/dashboard with Carbon Auditors page (/admin/carbon-auditors), 2) Cooperative login -> /cooperative/dashboard with Members, Agents, SSRTE, QR Codes pages, 3) Carbon Auditor login -> /auditor/dashboard with missions and stats, 4) Login page activation buttons (Member Cooperative, Agent Terrain) both working, 5) Add Auditor modal on Carbon Auditors page working with all form fields, 6) Add Parcel page with member and department selection working

features_verified.Admin Login and Dashboard: PASS - Login redirects to /admin/dashboard, shows Auditeurs Carbone button
features_verified.Carbon Auditor Management: PASS - /admin/carbon-auditors shows 1 auditor (Kouassi Jean-Marc), stats visible
features_verified.Add Auditor Modal: PASS - Modal opens with all fields: name, email, phone, password, zones, certifications
features_verified.Audit Missions List: PASS - API returns 1 mission for COOP-GAGNOA with 5 parcels
features_verified.Carbon Auditor Dashboard: PASS - /auditor/dashboard shows stats, certifications, pending missions
features_verified.Cooperative Login and Dashboard: PASS - Login redirects to /cooperative/dashboard, shows 7 members, financial stats
features_verified.Cooperative Members Management: PASS - /cooperative/members lists 7 members with status badges
features_verified.Cooperative Field Agents: PASS - /cooperative/agents shows 1 agent (Konan Marc), Add Agent modal works
features_verified.SSRTE Tracking: PASS - /cooperative/ssrte shows child labor monitoring form with all fields
features_verified.QR Codes Generation: PASS - /cooperative/qrcodes displays QR codes for 8 members with export options
features_verified.Add Parcel Page: PASS - /cooperative/parcels/new with member selection, department dropdown (80+ Ivorian departments)
features_verified.Member Account Activation: PASS - /activate-member page with phone input and verify button
features_verified.Agent Account Activation: PASS - /activate-agent page with cyan theme and phone verification

TestCarbonAuditorAdminAPIs.test_get_audit_stats_overview: PASS - Returns stats with auditors, missions, audits

TestCarbonAuditorDashboard.test_auditor_dashboard: PASS - Returns auditor info, stats, pending missions

TestCooperativeAPIs.test_cooperative_dashboard: PASS - Returns coop_info, members, parcels, lots, financial

mocked_apis_confirmed: SMS OTP - Messages simulated but not actually sent
Cloud Storage - Photo storage URLs simulated
